stemHtml:
Which of the following is a suitable method for measuring airfield visibility at night?

Note: In this case, the equipment being used is the Gold Visibility Meter.

options.a: Visibility is determined by human observers as this is more reliable than automatic measurement.
options.b: A filter in an automatic viewing mechanism is adjusted until the light is no longer seen.
options.c: A laser beam is used to determine the visibility with great accuracy in all directions.
options.d: An infrared sensor is used to measure visibility during both daytime and nighttime.
